---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or change for VidVeil
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case in your own
     words. Avoid jumping to a specific implementation here. -->

## Desired Behavior

<!-- What should VidVeil do that it currently doesn't? Describe the
     end-to-end behavior — search flow, admin flow, CLI flow, API surface,
     whichever applies. -->

## Use Case / Target User

<!-- Who benefits from this? Self-hosters? Operators? CLI/API consumers?
     Tor users? Developers integrating against the API? -->

## Constraints / Non-Goals

<!-- What is explicitly NOT in scope for this request? Any compatibility,
     privacy, or performance constraints we should respect? -->

## Compatibility Expectations

<!-- Pick one: -->

- [ ] Feature parity only — internal naming/routes can change.
- [ ] Route or API parity required — existing URLs/contracts must continue
      to work for downstream clients. (Justify why.)

## Notes / Prior Art

<!-- Links to similar features in other projects, RFCs, or discussions.
     Optional. -->
